title: Vežba 156

questions.text:
Nakon što je dobio pomoć od Sare, James je odlučio da napiše podsetnik kako bi drugi lakše mogli pronaći materijale/opremu.

Hello team,

To make it easier for everyone setting up or upgrading their workstations, here's an updated overview of where you can find commonly used items:

- Monitors

Monitors have been moved. You'll find them along the corridor, just past the break area. Look to your left, near the coffee machine.

- Keyboards

After last week's shipment, all keyboards are now kept in a labeled storage room. It's located near the main entrance — take a right just before reaching it. It's the second door on your left, across from the mail room.

- Ethernet Cables & Accessories

These are stored in a smaller closet a bit out of the way. Head towards the server room, but turn right just before the door. The closet is on your right. It's a bit of a trek, but worth it if you need cables or extra accessories.

Please keep these areas organized for others. If you move any equipment, let IT know!

Best,

James

Šta узrokuje malu poteškoću u dobijanju Ethernet kablova?

answers.answer: Nalaze se u malom ormariću koji je malo dalje.
Nalaze se blizu glavnih ulaznih vrata, zajedno sa tastaturom.

answers.feedback: James samo kaže da su tastature bile deo tereta, nije spomenuo kablove.

answers.answer: Čuvaju se zajedno sa monitorom i često se premeštaju.
answers.feedback: Monitori se čuvaju drugačije i nema informacija o njihovoj migraciji/premeštanju.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation:
James kaže da se kablovi čuvaju u malom ormariću koji je out of the way.

Obratite pažnju na deo koji se tiče Ethernet Cables & Accessories.
